design_philosophy: Senior-friendly, highly accessible, trust-inspiring. Prioritizing high contrast, large typography, clear navigation, and warm professional tones over flashy decorative trends. The design should feel established, authoritative, yet approachable.

rules: Minimum body font size should act as 18px on desktop, 16px on mobile.
Line height must be at least 1.6 for body text.
Paragraphs must be left-aligned, never justified or centered.
Never use light font weights (e.g., 300). Use regular (400) or higher.
Use generous spacing (p-8 to p-12) to reduce cognitive load and prevent misclicks.
Ensure clickable areas are at least 44x44px.
Keep layouts single-column on mobile, max 3 columns on desktop.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1E3A8A] text-white hover:bg-[#1E40AF] px-8 py-4 rounded-md font-semibold text-lg transition-colors border-2 border-transparent focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#1E3A8A]/30 focus:outline-none
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#1E3A8A] hover:bg-[#F3F4F6] px-8 py-4 rounded-md font-semibold text-lg border-2 border-[#1E3A8A] transition-colors focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#1E3A8A]/30 focus:outline-none

cards.service_card: bg-white border border-[#CBD5E1] rounded-lg p-8 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex flex-col h-full
cards.rules: No complex glassmorphism or floating soft UI. Borders should be crisp and visible.

forms.input: w-full border-2 border-[#CBD5E1] rounded-md px-4 py-3 text-lg bg-white focus:border-[#1E3A8A] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#1E3A8A] outline-none transition-colors
forms.label: block text-lg font-medium text-[#0F172A] mb-2
forms.rules: Labels must ALWAYS be positioned above inputs. No placeholder-only labels. High contrast focus states are mandatory.

navigation.header: bg-white border-b border-[#CBD5E1] sticky top-0 z-50
navigation.links: text-lg font-medium text-[#334155] hover:text-[#1E3A8A] hover:underline underline-offset-4 transition-colors p-2

hero.layout: Two-column on desktop (text left, image right). High contrast overlay if text is over image, but prefer split layout for seniors.
hero.sub_tagline: Let Our Experience Be Your Guide

services_section.layout: Grid of 4 cards (1 col mobile, 2 col tablet, 2 or 4 col desktop).

about_section.layout: Image of Katrina alongside her bio and credentials (Enrolled Agent, AZCLDP).

consultation_form.layout: Single clear column or 2-column wide layout. Steps clearly labeled if multi-step, but single page with clear sections preferred for seniors.

hero_background.description: Joyful senior couple reviewing documents, representing peace of mind and planning.

katrina_headshot.description: Professional middle-aged woman in elegant attire, representing Katrina.

legal_documents.description: Close up of person signing legal form, usable for Services or Contact sections.

icons.rules: Icons must be accompanied by text labels. Do not rely solely on icons for navigation or actions.

accessibility_testing_attributes.rules: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='consultation-form-submit'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette to maintain high contrast (WCAG AA/AAA).
Use left alignment for all body copy and paragraphs.
Do NOT use glassmorphism, floating elements, or hidden hamburger menus on desktop.
Ensure the consultation form uses the Shadcn Calendar for date selection, ensuring the trigger is large and readable.
Do not use generic Inter font. Implement Outfit for headings and Work Sans for body text.
Add hover and focus states to all interactive elements with high contrast shifts.
Provide clear labels for all form fields.
